title: Proposal Findings (per review pass)
description: The host model writes one of these per criterion pass (excellence-findings.json, impact-findings.json, implementation-findings.json). build_report.py renders it to a PDF. Used by reports 01, 02, 03.

sections.description: Review modules from the rubric, in rubric order.

evidence.description: Short quotation or precise section/page/table/figure reference. Required in practice for partial/missing items.

assessment.description: What is incomplete/unclear/inconsistent/insufficient and why it matters for this criterion.

improvement.description: Internal Improvement Report only. Concrete suggested improvement. MUST NOT appear in the final ESR (report 05).

strengths.description: Only the most important criterion-level strengths.

shortcomings.description: Most important criterion-level shortcomings; do not duplicate one weakness.

esr_comment.description: Draft ESR-style comment for this criterion (evidence-based, no rewriting suggestions).

score.description: Single criterion-level score. Must match the severity/number of shortcomings (see rubric score-comment consistency gate).
